title: Air Force Confirms F-35 Stealth Coating Defect Found During Flight Test
body_text: The Pentagon disclosed today that a significant stealth coating defect was identified on F-35 fighter jets during routine flight test operations at Edwards Air Force Base. Lockheed Martin engineers are working to resolve the issue.
classifier_reasoning: Keyword match: stealth, flight test, air force, Lockheed

title: Third Consecutive Year of Coral Reef Bleaching Detected Across Caribbean
body_text: NOAA scientists confirmed record sea surface temperatures are causing mass coral reef bleaching across the Caribbean for the third consecutive year. Biodiversity loss from the bleaching events threatens coastal ecosystems and local fisheries.
classifier_reasoning: Keyword match: coral reef, NOAA, sea level, biodiversity, ecosystem

title: Magnitude 6.8 Earthquake Strikes Off Coast of Puerto Rico
body_text: USGS reports a magnitude 6.8 earthquake struck 45km north of San Juan, Puerto Rico at 03:14 UTC. The seismic event was felt across the island. A tsunami advisory has been issued. Tectonic plate movement along the Puerto Rico Trench fault line is believed responsible.
classifier_reasoning: Keyword match: magnitude, earthquake, seismic, USGS, fault line, tsunami

title: Federal Reserve Signals Potential Interest Rate Cut Amid Inflation Data
body_text: The Federal Reserve indicated it may cut interest rates at its next meeting following new inflation data showing GDP growth slowing. Bond yields fell sharply while the stock market rallied on the news. Treasury officials confirmed a revised economic outlook.
classifier_reasoning: Keyword match: federal reserve, interest rate, inflation, GDP, bond yield, treasury

title: NATO Summit Produces New Defense Spending Agreement Amid Geopolitical Tensions
body_text: Leaders at the NATO summit agreed to increase defense spending targets following escalating geopolitical tensions. The treaty includes provisions for joint military exercises. Several parliaments must ratify the agreement before it takes effect.

title: Navy Pilot Reports Unidentified Aerial Phenomenon During Training Exercise
body_text: A Navy pilot filed an official UAP report after encountering an unidentified aerial phenomenon during a training exercise off the coast of Virginia. The object exhibited anomalous flight characteristics inconsistent with known aircraft. SETI researchers have been notified.

title: Pentagon Awards $2B Contract for Climate Monitoring Satellite Constellation
body_text: The Pentagon awarded a $2 billion contract to aerospace companies including Boeing Defense and Northrop Grumman to build a climate monitoring satellite constellation. The satellites will track carbon emissions, deforestation, and sea level rise. The contract follows a Congressional bill authorizing the program.
classifier_reasoning: Multi-label: pentagon/boeing defense/northrop (MILITARY_AEROSPACE) + carbon/deforestation/sea level (ENVIRONMENTAL) + bill passed/congress (POLITICAL)

title: Local Restaurant Reviews in San Juan
